content_body: Last weekend at the cabin was a great experience! The cabin is beautiful and very warm and comfortable. The bed was nicer than my bed back home, and the hot tub was a nice touch to the overall experience. The views are breathtaking and the quiet was almost deafening after the usual noise of Atlanta and its suburbs. Could not have asked for anything more. Rick was awesome and always answered my myriad of phone calls with calm and patience. The wood was delivered within a couple hours so we could keep the fire going in the main floor fireplace—very romantic. Also special was the extension of our checkout time, allowing us to calmly get out the door without having to stress and rush—thank you for that!! We hated to head back home on Sunday! We will definitely be coming back to this place in the near future. I will recommend you guys to my friends. The staff was very polite, attentive, and professional. Thanks again for a wonderful time away from reality!!
title: Sublime Getaway De-stressor
